title: Get involved - Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats
headings: h2: Help us make a difference in our communities
text_excerpt: Get involved - Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats Vote Lib Dem Get involved Local news Our campaigns Campaign wins Lisa Smart MP Our local teams Our party Contact Donate Join Donate Join Get involved Get emails Display a poster Andrew Stunell Fund Our campaigns Protect Our Community Park at Tangshutt Fields An additional hospital for Stockport NHS dentists Fair adoption pay Save our green belt Community-led housing Stop sewage Marple's World Heritage Speed Camera Campaign Illegal off-road biking Save Hazel Grove's NatWest Branch Save post office services in High Lane Save Stockport Post Office Campaign wins Specialist status for Stepping Hill Save our ticket offices Offerton fire crews saved New leisure hub for Marple Preserve the Green Belt Save Central Library Preserving Chadkirk Chapel Saving the 375 bus Rail services on the Rose Hill line Our local teams Bredbury & Woodley Bredbury Green & Romiley Hazel Grove Manor Marple North Marple South & High Lane Norbury & Woodsmoor Offerton Our party What we stand for Get updates Volunteer with us Help us make a difference in our communities Become a volunteer today We are so pleased you want to join the team. If you already know how you would like to help, let us know below, if not then you can skip those questions and hit the big yellow 'I'm in' button and someone will be in contact. Thank you. Oops! Yes No I'm in The Liberal Democrats may use the information you provide, including your political opinions, to further our objectives and share it with our elected representatives. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy: libdems.org.uk/privacy . You can exercise your rights and withdraw your consent to future communications by contacting us: data.protection@libdems.org.uk or: DPO, Lib Dems, 66 Buckingham Gate, London, SW1E 6AU. Want to donate now? The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
